heading: Definitions
label: 1182 Definitions
notes: Amendments2022—Par. (1). , amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) consisted of subpars. (A) and (B) defining “debtor”.Pub. L. 117–151, § 2(i)(1)(B), amended par. children.heading: .—Debtor
children.label: 1 .—Debtor
children.text: The term “debtor” means a small business debtor.

children.heading: .—Debtor in possession
children.label: 2 .—Debtor in possession
children.text: The term “debtor in possession” means the debtor, unless removed as debtor in possession under .section 1185(a) of this title
